---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or need that this feature would address. Why is this feature important to you?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why they don't fully address the use case.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or references about the feature request here.
